commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate a set of "buddy class" for all entity types in a DbContext

options.name: --output-dir
options.description: The directory to put partial class files in. Paths are relative to the project directory. [Default: Models]

options.name: --project
options.description: Relative path to the project folder of the target project. Default value is the current folder.

options.name: --context
options.description: The name of the DbContext class to generate.

options.name: --project
options.description: Relative path to the project folder of the target project. Default value is the current folder.
